final_json.description: This piece was inspired by "The Myth of Sisyphus" by Daniel Perkins which is often associated with Existentialist Philosophy and the Absurdism movement.  The Pepe community, and the crypto artist community at large, say GM to this environment each and every day.  GM!

This piece was inspired by "The Myth of Sisyphus" by Darrel Perkins which is often associated with the Absurdism movement and Albert Camus. The Pepe community, and the crypto artist community at large, say GM to this environment each and every day. GM!
Been a while since I made one of these
DJ CORN KNOME SPINS "ILL KINETIK" by DJ DUST-IT
Only Gay bird in the flock

From the golden mines of Nibiru they descended-star-forged sovereigns decreeing fate in cuneiform and croak. Yet in the great flood of memes arose one who wears the horned crown lightly: 'Rare Pepe feels good, man.' The Anunnaki laughed in seven voices, and humanity was remade in His image... one smug expression at a time.
